title: cyphostemma nodiglandulosum
intro: Cyphostemma nodiglandulosum, also known as the 'Cape grape', is a succulent plant that belongs to the grape family (Vitaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and infections. The roots of Cyphostemma nodiglandulosum contain flavonoids and alkaloids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, providing health benefits such as wound healing, anti-diarrheal effects, and protection against certain bacterial infections. Herbal preparations of Cyphostemma nodiglandulosum can be made by infusing the roots in water or using them in a tea, but further research is required to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
